text:
Created attachment 185983
/var/log/messages

Hi,

I receive a lot of errors on ThinkPad T520 (Intel only) laptop with i915kms driver and 'intel' driver in xorg.conf at /var/log/messages (attached).

The CPU/GPU is Intel (R) Core(TM) i7-2640M.

The OS is FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p1, the 1064 PID is 'X' (xorg).

Regards,
vermaden
